stages.concept:
# Unit 028: 지시대명사 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **지시대명사**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> **This** is my bag.
> 이것은 나의 가방이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 지시대명사는 사물이나 사람을 **가리킬 때** 쓰는 대명사예요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 가까운 것을 가리킬 때는 **this(이것)**, **these(이것들)**를 써요.

> **This** is my book.
> 이것은 나의 책이다.

> **These** are my friends.
> 이 사람들은 나의 친구들이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 먼 것을 가리킬 때는 **that(저것)**, **those(저것들)**를 써요.

> **That** is her house.
> 저것은 그녀의 집이다.

> **Those** are my shoes.
> 저것들은 나의 신발이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 지시대명사는 형용사처럼 **명사 앞에서** 꾸며주기도 해요.

> **This** book is interesting.
> 이 책은 재미있다.

> **Those** flowers are beautiful.
> 저 꽃들은 아름답다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 가까우면 this/these, 멀면 that/those! 정리해 볼게요.

| | 단수 | 복수 |
|------|------|------|
| 가까운 것 | this (이것) | these (이것들) |
| 먼 것 | that (저것) | those (저것들) |
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 028: 재귀대명사 (강조/관용 표현) - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
Help (     ) to some fruit.
보기: yourself / himself
> **정답** yourself

---

**02.** 보기에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
She lives by (     ) in a small apartment.
보기: himself / herself
> **정답** herself

---

**03.** 보기에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
Make (     ) at home.
보기: yourself / myself
> **정답** yourself

---

**04.** 보기에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
He (     ) told me the story.
보기: myself / himself
> **정답** himself

---

**05.** 보기에서 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
I (     ) baked the cookies for the party.
보기: myself / herself
> **정답** myself

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Help yourselves to some juice. (한 명에게)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** yourselves → yourself

---

**07.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She lives by himself in the countryside.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** himself → herself

---

**08.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I taught itself how to ride a bicycle.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** itself → myself

---

**09.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
They enjoyed itself at the beach.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** itself → themselves

---

**10.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
He burned herself while cooking.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** herself → himself

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
편하게 계세요. (한 명에게)
Make at home.
> **정답** yourself

---

**12.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그녀는 혼자 산다.
She lives by .
> **정답** herself

---

**13.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
먹고 싶은 것 마음껏 드세요. (여러 명에게)
Help to some food.
> **정답** yourselves

---

**14.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그 선생님이 직접 설명해 주셨다.
The teacher explained it .
> **정답** himself (herself)

---

**15.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
나는 혼자서 여행을 갔다.
I went on a trip by .
> **정답** myself

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그는 혼자서 저녁을 먹었다.
dinner He ate by himself
> **정답** He / ate / dinner / by / himself

---

**17.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
우리는 스스로 그 프로젝트를 완성했다.
finished We ourselves the project
> **정답** We / ourselves / finished / the / project

---

**18.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
매니저가 직접 사과하러 왔다.
himself to apologize came The manager
> **정답** The manager / himself / came / to apologize.

---

**19.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
나의 여동생은 유리에 베였다.
My sister cut herself
on glass.
> **정답** My / sister / cut / herself / on / glass.

---

**20.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
학생들은 스스로 교실을 꾸몄다.
The students decorated
themselves. the classroom
> **정답** The students / decorated / the classroom / themselves.
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 028: 재귀대명사 재귀용법, 강조용법 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
My dad was preparing dinner for _____.
He burned ________ while he was cooking.
us - her
ourselves - her
ourselves - herself
us - himself
> **정답** us - himself

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Mom tried to fix the computer __________________,
but when she looked at it, the computer
_________________ had no problem.
herself - it
herself - itself
her - itself
her - it
> **정답** herself - itself

---

**03.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The famous painter only drew himself in his
life time.
I will be proud of me.
Students should do their homework
themselves.
She sometimes talks to herself with soft voice.
> **정답** I will be proud of me.

---

**04.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I locked myself outside.
She solved some math questions herself.
Tom introduced himself to the class.
My mom cut her when she was cooking.
> **정답** My mom cut her when she was cooking.

---

**05.** 다음 문장의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 모두
고르시오. [2개]
I myself saw the accident.
I got myself a pair of new shoes.
We ourselves try to understand this situation.
He himself believes in his goals.
He calls himself very talented.
> **정답** We ourselves try to understand this situation., He
himself believes in his goals.

---

**06.** 다음 문장의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 모두
고르시오.[2개]
He should take care of himself.
They themselves chose their future path.
She pinched herself to stay awake.
We learned to love ourselves.
You yourself can meet the singer.
• pinch 꼬집다
> **정답** She pinched herself to stay awake., We learned to
love ourselves.

---

**07.** 다음 문장의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 모두
고르시오.[2개]
Amy fell down and hurt herself.
We enjoyed ourselves at the festival.
He himself prepared a meal.
Tom himself went there.
They found themselves lost in the forest.
> **정답** They found themselves lost in the forest., We
enjoyed ourselves at the festival.

---

**08.** 다음 문장의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 모두
고르시오.[2개]
She herself called him and asked for help.
The students got themselves into trouble.
We made our travel plans ourselves.
The children made this juice themselves.
Jake sometimes talks to himself when he is
alone.
> **정답** The children made this juice themselves., We
made our travel plans ourselves.

---

**09.** 밑줄 친 부분을 생략할 수 있는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
We went there ourselves.
Don't put yourself first all the time.
I made myself a nice cake.
He himself cleans the house.
> **정답** He himself cleans the house., We went there
ourselves.

---

**10.** 밑줄 친 부분을 생략할 수 있는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Amy wrote a letter to herself.
He himself hugged the kid.
She bought a present for herself.
I baked the cookies myself.
> **정답** I baked the cookies myself., He himself hugged the
kid.

---

**11.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 문장을 쓸 때 사용하지 않는
단어를 고르시오.
그녀는 스스로를 자랑스러워 한다.
is proud of
her
She
herself
> **정답** her

---

**12.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 문장을 쓸 때 사용하지 않는
단어를 고르시오.
소년은 그자신을 보호하기 위해 태권도를 배웠다.
to protect him
to protect himself
A boy
learned taekwondo
> **정답** to protect him

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
She made herself a sandwich.
You should wash your clothes yourself.
The children solved the difficult puzzle
himself.
He himself caught the thief.
> **정답** The children solved the difficult puzzle himself.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The room itself has some strange smell.
She set up a tent herself.
Amy cooked this steak myself.
Did you yourself write the story?
> **정답** Amy cooked this steak myself.

---

**15.** 우리말과 일치하도록 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
Emma는 캔버스에 그녀 자신을 그렸다.
Emma drew on the canvas.
> **정답** herself

---

**16.** 우리말과 일치하도록 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
사람들 앞에서 Jake는 그 자신을 "예술가"라고 불렀다.
Jake called an "artist" in front of people.
> **정답** himself

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
We really enjoyed us at the
school festival.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** us → ourselves

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Did you bake the bread you?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** you? → yourself

---

**19.** 문장에서 틀린부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐 쓰세요.
I was angry with me.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** me. → myself

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
[2개]
My brother and I can do a lot of things ourselves .
My brother does his homework and cleans the rooms
him . I wash dishes and put out trash myself .
We even make us meals.
> **정답** ourselves, himself, myself, ourselves
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 028 재귀대명사 재귀용법, 강조용법중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오. (재귀대명사 추가)
그녀는 거울에 비친 자기 모습을 보고 있는 중이다.
힌트 (     ) look at
She is  (     )   (     )   (     )  in the mirror.
정답 looking, at, herself

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오. (재귀대명사 추가)
그들은 그들이 직접 텐트를 치고 있습니다.
힌트 (     ) set up a tent
They are  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 setting, up, a, tent, themselves

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오. (재귀대명사 추가)
그녀는 그녀 자신을 사랑한다.
She  (     )   (     ) .
정답 loves, herself

---

**04.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오. (재귀대명사 추가)
우리가 직접 주방을 청소했다.
힌트 (     ) clean the kitchen
We  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 cleaned, the, kitchen, ourselves

---

**05.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오. (재귀대명사 추가)
반 친구들에게 너 소개를 해 주겠니?
힌트 (     ) introduce
Can you  (     )   (     )  to the class?
정답 introduce, yourself

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오. (재귀대명사 추가)
그는 그가 직접 식사를 요리 했다.
힌트 (     ) cook meals
He  (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 cooked, meals, himself

---

**07.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오. (재귀대명사 추가)
나는 내 자신이 자랑스럽다.
힌트 (     ) be proud of
I  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 am, proud, of, myself

---

**08.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오. (재귀대명사 추가)
너는 너 자신을 돌봐야 한다.
힌트 (     ) take care of
You should  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 take, care, of, yourself

---

**09.** 다음 글에서 틀린 부분을 어법에 맞게 고쳐 쓰시오. [2개]
Amy and Tom met at the party for the first time.
They introduced [them]  and talked together. They
became friends. The party [it]  was boring, but
they made new friends. That night, after the party,
Amy called [him]  and talked some more.
정답 themselves, itself, him

---

**10.** 다음 글에서 틀린 부분을 어법에 맞게 고쳐 쓰시오.
Last night, I saw a strange man. I thought he was a
thief. I [myself]  called the police. The police came,
but couldn't catch [him] . The next day, the man
came to us. He introduced [him]  as a new
neighbor.
정답 myself, him, himself

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 028: 재귀대명사 재귀용법, 강조용법 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
My dad was preparing lunch for _____.
He burned ________ while he was cooking. us - him ourselves - him ourselves - himself us - himself
> 정답: us - himself

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Mom tried to fix the computer __________________, but when she looked at it, the computer _________________ had no problem. herself - it herself - itself her - itself her - it
> 정답: herself - itself

---

**03.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The famous artist only drew herself in her life time.
I will be proud of me.
Students should do their homework themselves.
He sometimes talks to himself with soft voice.
> 정답: I will be proud of me.

---

**04.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I locked myself outside.
She solved some math questions herself.
Tom introduced himself to the class.
My dad cut him when he was cooking.
> 정답: My dad cut him when he was cooking.

---

**05.** 다음 문장의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
I myself saw the accident.
I got myself a pair of new shoes.
We ourselves try to understand this situation.
He himself believes in his dreams.
He calls himself super handsome.
> 정답: We ourselves try to understand this situation., He himself believes in his dreams.

---

**06.** 다음 문장의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
He should take care of himself.
They themselves chose their future path.
She pinched herself to stay awake.
We learned to love ourselves.
You yourself can meet the actor.
> 정답: She pinched herself to stay awake., We learned to love ourselves.

---

**07.** 다음 문장의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Kate fell down and hurt herself.
We enjoyed ourselves at the party.
He himself prepared a meal.
Tom himself went there.
They found themselves lost in the park.
> 정답: They found themselves lost in the park., We enjoyed ourselves at the party.

---

**08.** 다음 문장의 밑줄 친 부분과 쓰임이 같은 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
She herself called him and asked for help.
The students got themselves into trouble.
We made our travel plans ourselves.
The children made this lemonade themselves.
Jake sometimes talks to himself when he is alone.
> 정답: The children made this lemonade themselves., We made our travel plans ourselves.

---

**09.** 밑줄 친 부분을 생략할 수 있는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
We went there ourselves.
Don't put yourself first all the time.
I made myself a nice sandwich.
He himself cleans the house.
> 정답: He himself cleans the house., We went there ourselves.

---

**10.** 밑줄 친 부분을 생략할 수 있는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Kate wrote a letter to herself.
He himself hugged the kid.
She bought a present for herself.
I baked the cookies myself.
> 정답: I baked the cookies myself., He himself hugged the kid.

---

**11.** 다음 우리말과 일치하도록 문장을 쓸 때 사용하지 않는 단어를 고르시오.
그녀는 스스로를 자랑스러워 한다. is proud of her She herself
> 정답: her
